Combos.name: Cross-Between-Behind
Combos.notes: Stay low, eyes up. 3 sets of 10.

Stationary.name: Pound Dribbles
Stationary.notes: Shoulder height, pound it hard. 30 seconds each hand.

Stationary.name: Stationary Dribbling Series
Stationary.notes: Pound dribbles. Knees slightly bent, chest up. Dribble hard at waist height.

Stationary.name: Steph Curry Warm Up Routine
Stationary.notes: Two-ball dribbling routine. Builds extreme coordination and handle speed.

Catch and Shoot.name: Star Drill
Catch and Shoot.notes: Game speed cuts to 5 spots. Make 10 total.

Catch and Shoot.name: Warm Up Free Throw Line Shooting
Catch and Shoot.notes: Catch and shoot coming off a curl cut near the free throw line. Good early practice drill.

Catch and Shoot.name: Post Pass Shooting Drill
Catch and Shoot.notes: Continuous movement. Pass into the post, relocate, receive the kick-out, and shoot.

Off the Dribble.name: 1-Dribble Pull-Up
Off the Dribble.notes: Explosive first step, balance before shooting.

Game Speed.name: Loop Shooting Drill
Game Speed.notes: Combines cutting, passing, and shooting in a continuous loop.

Game Speed.name: 7 Spot Shooting Drill
Game Speed.notes: Competitive team drill. Two teams, one ball per team. Race to hit shots from 7 designated spots.

Sprints.name: Suicides
Sprints.notes: Touch the line every time. Under 32 seconds.

Through Contact.name: Pad Finishing
Through Contact.notes: Coach uses a football pad to bump the player in the air.

Mikan.name: Reverse Mikan
Mikan.notes: Keep the ball high, use the backboard.

Movement.name: Banana Drill
Movement.notes: Continuous drill. Focus on hard, precise passes and correct timing on cuts.

Movement.name: Star Passing Drill
Movement.notes: 5 stations. Pass and follow your pass to the next point of the star. Keep feet moving.

Movement.name: 3-Person Pass, Cut & Replace
Movement.notes: Read the floor, pass, cut hard to the rim, and fill the open spot. Maintain spacing.

Stationary & Footwork.name: Wall Passes (Chest & Bounce)
Stationary & Footwork.notes: Step into the pass, snap wrists. 20 reps each.

Stationary & Footwork.name: Slide & Pass Drill
Stationary & Footwork.notes: Slide defensively without crossing feet, transition into a strong pass.

Stationary & Footwork.name: Diamond Passing
Stationary & Footwork.notes: Use 5 cones. Works heavily on jump stops, maintaining balance, pivoting, and passing under control.

Box Out.name: Circle Box Out
Box Out.notes: Find the body, stay low, hands up.

On-Ball.name: Zig-Zag Slides
On-Ball.notes: Don't cross feet, chest up, active hands.

Pressing & Trapping.name: 4 v 4 Transition Defense
Pressing & Trapping.notes: Simulates a broken press. Defense must communicate, scramble, and stop the ball while outnumbered 3v4.

Pressing & Trapping.name: Diamond Press - Free Throw Drill
Pressing & Trapping.notes: Set up the Diamond press immediately off a made free throw. Rotate players until a FT is made.

Pressing & Trapping.name: Diamond Press - Overload 6v4
Pressing & Trapping.notes: 6 offensive players vs 4 defenders. Stresses defensive rotations, traps, and communication.

Zone Concepts.name: Box and 1 - Shell Drill
Zone Concepts.notes: Focus on the 4 zone defenders. Shift together like you are connected by rubber bands. Do not break the box shape.

Zone Concepts.name: Box and 1 - Shadow Drill
Zone Concepts.notes: Focus on the Chaser. Stay connected hip-to-hip with the star player. Move feet, do not reach with hands.

Horns Action.name: Horns Matchup Drill (3v3)
Horns Action.notes: Live 3v3 using only Horns entries. Work on spacing, timing, and defensive communication.

Horns Action.name: Horns 2v2 Read & Counter
Horns Action.notes: Make live reads out of the elbow entry while defenders apply tight ball pressure.

Zoom Action.name: Read and React: 3-Level Scoring
Zoom Action.notes: Receiver catches off the handoff and must quickly decide to shoot the 3, pull-up mid-range, or finish at the rim.

Zoom Action.name: Read & React: Bigman Drill
Zoom Action.notes: Focuses on the big man making high-level passing decisions from the top of the key during Zoom action.

Zoom Action.name: Numbers Advantage Drill
Zoom Action.notes: Simulates the advantage created by Zoom. Force players to make quick decisions to score before the defense recovers.

Pick & Roll.name: Pick & Roll Passing Drill
Pick & Roll.notes: Brush the screen, create separation, and focus on delivering accurate passes to the roll man.

Pacing.name: 22 in 2 Outlet Drill
Pacing.notes: Score 22 points in 2 minutes. Grab ball out of the net, outlet before it hits the ground. Keep the pace furious.

Pacing.name: Outlet Pass Drill
Pacing.notes: Simple fundamentals. Rebound footwork, chin the ball, pivot, and hit the outlet target on the wing.

Advantage Situations.name: 3-on-2 Continuous Fast Break
Advantage Situations.notes: Continuous 3v2. Rebounder passes to the sideline and joins 2 waiting players to attack the other basket. 2 of the previous offensive players stay back to play defense.

Advantage Situations.name: 3 on 2 / 2 on 1 Outlet & Transition
Advantage Situations.notes: Classic drill. Push 3v2 on the way down, then the two defenders transition into offense and push 2v1 the other way.
